dynamics_operator: Gradient descent on communicative utility vs random semiotic drift
perturbation_operator: Introduction of new slang, technical jargon, or isolated population dialects
stability_condition: Mutual intelligibility > threshold across all coordinate nodes
failure_mode: SEMANTIC_DISSOCIATION (Symbols detach from original physical grounding, leading to total coordination collapse)

observable_metrics.name: Referential Drift
observable_metrics.estimator: KL-Divergence between symbol-meaning pairs across two generations

edge_conditions: As B2 expansion increases (more things named), B3 coordination cost increases exponentially
Eventually, B4 symbolic depth exceeds the processing limit of the agents
notes: Tests B4 (Symbolic Depth) saturation leading to B3 (Coordination) failure.
